item.text: I’ll make a single-file patch in `context-harness` by locating the sentinel constant in `src/renderer.rs`, then add the exact doc comment line immediately above that definition and verify formatting/tests minimally.

I found the target constant in `context-harness/src/renderer.rs`; there is already a near-match comment, so I’m now applying a one-line wording update to match your exact sentinel comment text directly above `HARNESS_MARKER`.
I’ve made the single-line comment change in `renderer.rs`. Next I’ll run formatting and the narrow crate tests to verify nothing else regressed.
